nasb.text: The words of the wise heard in quietness are better than the shouting of a ruler among fools.

esv.text: The words of the wise heard in quiet are better than the shouting of a ruler among fools.

cnv.text: 聽智慧人安安靜靜說出來的話，勝過聽管理愚昧者的人的喊叫。

ccb.text: 智者的细语胜过官长在愚人中的喊叫。

csbs.text: 听智慧人安静的言语， 胜过听管辖者在愚昧人中的喊叫。
